rows.notes: Taken from gpt-5-mini; 'Sheet.' is a distinct header line at the top-left of the page. gemini-flash combined this with the year.
Taken from gpt-5-mini; '1900.' is a distinct header line. gemini-flash combined this with 'Sheet'.
Taken from gemini-flash; this page number is clearly visible at the top-right. gpt-5-mini missed this row.
Consensus on row type and no amounts. Description 'Assets.' taken from gpt-5-mini as it includes the period visible in the image.

Description 'Cash at Bankers C.B.' taken from gemini-flash, which accurately captured the 'C.B.'. Amounts for shillings (4) and pence (6) agree between extractors. For pounds, gpt-5-mini's reading of '5715' was chosen over gemini-flash's '5716' because gpt-5-mini's note explained this choice was to maintain arithmetic consistency with the subsequent subtotal '5952.4', which I verified. The visual '5' or '6' is ambiguous, but the arithmetic consistency provides strong justification for '5715'.
rows.english_description_with_amount: Cash held at bankers' account, amounting to £5715 4s 6d.

rows.notes: Amounts agree between extractors (236£ 15s 10d). Description 'Lithrary Account L.C.A.' chosen from gemini-flash as it more closely matches the handwriting compared to gpt-5-mini's 'Library Account'.

Taken from gpt-5-mini. This subtotal is clearly visible on the page as '5952 . 4' (5952 Pounds, 4 Pence, 0 Shillings). Its value is consistent with the sum of the preceding two entries (5715£ 4s 6d + 236£ 15s 10d = 5952£ 0s 4d). gemini-flash missed this subtotal row entirely.

Amounts for pounds (3000) agree between extractors; shillings and pence columns are blank. Description 'Furniture II.229' taken from gemini-flash as it captures the full text visible on the page. Empty strings are used for blank shillings and pence values.
rows.english_description_with_amount: Value of college furniture amounting to £3000 0s 0d.

rows.notes: Description 'Investments I.250' taken from gemini-flash, matching the visible text. Amounts for shillings (14) and pence (2) agree. For pounds, the digit in the tens place for Investments is visually a '1' (6511). While the subsequent subtotal '9571 14 2' implies a '7' (3000 + 6571 = 9571), I have transcribed the individual entry's visible digit as '1' (6511) as it appears on the page, noting the discrepancy with the ledger's subtotal. gpt-5-mini also read '6511', while gemini-flash read '6571'.
rows.english_description_with_amount: Value of college investments amounting to £6511 14s 2d.

rows.notes: This subtotal '9571 14 2' is clearly visible in the image. gpt-5-mini extracted '9511 14 2', which would be arithmetically consistent with its (and my) reading of '6511' for Investments, but inconsistent with the visible subtotal on the page. I've transcribed the subtotal as it visually appears. gemini-flash missed this subtotal row entirely.
Consensus on row type and no amounts. Description 'Due to the college: -' taken from gemini-flash as it more closely matches the handwriting (lowercase 'college', uses a hyphen).

Values and description 'Rent of Lands I.5.' taken from gemini-flash. The image clearly shows 13 Pounds, 4 Shillings, and no pence (only a faint dot). gpt-5-mini incorrectly read this as '134' Pounds by combining the pounds and shillings figures.
rows.english_description_with_amount: Rent due from college lands amounting to £13 4s 0d.

rows.notes: Pounds (22), shillings (15), and pence (3) taken from gemini-flash; gpt-5-mini incorrectly read '224' pounds by including part of the reference number 'I.29'. Description 'Tithes I.29' refined from gemini-flash's 'Tither I.29' to match the visible handwriting, including 'I.29'.
rows.english_description_with_amount: Tithes due to the college amounting to £22 15s 3d.

rows.notes: Amounts agree between extractors (53£ 13s 4d). Description 'Houses on long Leases I.17.' taken from gemini-flash as it captures the full visible text.
rows.english_description: Income from houses on long leases.
rows.english_description_with_amount: Income from houses on long leases amounting to £53 13s 4d.

rows.notes: Amounts for pounds (1) and shillings (15) agree. Description 'Leaseholds I.22.' taken from gemini-flash. The pence column is blank in the image, so an empty string is used for pence, aligning with gemini-flash's interpretation.
rows.english_description_with_amount: Income from leasehold properties amounting to £1 15s 0d.

rows.notes: Amounts for pounds (70) agree; shillings and pence columns are blank. Description 'Senior Common Room II.199' taken from gemini-flash. Empty strings are used for blank shillings and pence values.
rows.english_description: Income from the Senior Common Room.
rows.english_description_with_amount: Income from the Senior Common Room amounting to £70 0s 0d.

rows.notes: This subtotal '484 3 7' is clearly visible in the image. gpt-5-mini extracted the visible numbers correctly. gemini-flash missed this row. Note: This subtotal is arithmetically inconsistent with the preceding entries (Rent of Lands 13£ 4s, Tithes 22£ 15s 3d, Houses 53£ 13s 4d, Leaseholds 1£ 15s, Senior Common Room 70£), which sum to 161£ 7s 7d. The original ledger appears to contain an arithmetic error, or the individual entry numbers were misread by the original ledger keeper to create this subtotal.

Taken from gemini-flash. This line is clearly a header, underlined, with no associated monetary amounts. gpt-5-mini incorrectly extracted amounts for this line, associating them with the header description.
Taken from gemini-flash. The image clearly shows 'Michell I.147' with amounts '18 10 11'. gpt-5-mini misattributed these amounts to the preceding header and incorrectly identified its next entry.
rows.english_description_with_amount: How Exhibition Fund balance (Michell), amounting to £18 10s 11d.

rows.notes: Taken from gemini-flash. The image clearly shows ditto marks for description, reference 'I.153', and amounts '16 14' (no pence). gpt-5-mini completely missed this row.
rows.english_description_with_amount: How Exhibition Fund balance (Michell), amounting to £16 14s 0d.

rows.notes: Amounts agree between extractors (19£ 12s 7d). Description 'Lorcombe Richards Fund I.166' taken from gemini-flash as it more closely matches the handwriting and includes the reference number. 'Lorcombe' is preferred over 'Loscombe' after visual inspection.
rows.english_description_with_amount: Lorcombe Richards Fund balance amounting to £19 12s 7d.

rows.notes: Taken from gpt-5-mini. This subtotal '54 17 6' is clearly visible in the image and arithmetically matches the sum of the three preceding fund entries (18£ 10s 11d + 16£ 14s 0d + 19£ 12s 7d = 54£ 17s 6d). gemini-flash missed this subtotal row entirely.

rows.notes: Based on visual inspection. This date is on its own line. Taken from gpt-5-mini, which correctly identified this as a separate header line. gemini-flash combined it with the signature.

Based on visual inspection. This signature is on its own line. The name is 'W.C. Jackson F.C.A.'. gpt-5-mini identified this as a separate line but misread the signature ('W.C. Taddard F.C.O.'). gemini-flash combined this with the date.
Taken from gemini-flash. This firm name is clearly visible as a distinct header line below the signature. gpt-5-mini missed this row entirely.
